metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM filtering parser for Cisco ISE Administrator events
properties.query:
let parser = (starttime: datetime=datetime(null), 
  endtime: datetime=datetime(null), 
  username_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  targetappname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  srchostname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  eventtype_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  eventresultdetails_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  eventresult: string = '*',
  disabled: bool=false,
  pack: bool = false) {
Syslog
| where not(disabled) and ProcessName has "CISE_Administrative_and_Operational_Audit"
| where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
    and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
    and (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0) // No Target app name
    and (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(HostIP, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
    and (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0 or HostName has_any (srchostname_has_any))
    and ((array_length(eventtype_in) == 0) or "Logon" in~ (eventtype_in))
| where SyslogMessage has "Administrator-Login"
| extend
    EventVendor = "Cisco",
    EventProduct = "ISE",
    EventSchema = "Authentication",
    EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
    EventCount = int(1),
    EventStartTime = EventTime,
    EventEndTime = EventTime,
    EventSeverity = "Informational",
    EventType = "Logon",
    Type = "Syslog"
| project-rename
    SrcIpAddr = HostIP,
    SrcDvcId = HostName
| extend
    SrcDvcIdType = "Other"
| parse SyslogMessage with * "Administrator-Login:" * ", " KeyValuePairs
| parse-kv KeyValuePairs as (ConfigVersionId: string, AdminInterface: string, AdminIPAddress: string, OperationMessageText: string, Port: int, AcsInstance: string, AdminName: string) with (pair_delimiter=",", kv_delimiter="=")
| extend
    EventResult = iff(isnotempty(AdminName), "Success", "Failure"), // AdminName exists in Syslog if authentication was successful
    EventResultDetails = iff(isempty(AdminName), case(
        OperationMessageText has "Failed password", "Incorrect password",
        OperationMessageText has "User unknown", "No such user",
        "Other"
    ), ""),
    TargetUsername = coalesce(AdminName, ""),
    TargetUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(AdminName), "Simple", "")
| where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or TargetUsername has_any (username_has_any)
| where (eventresult == '*' or eventresult =~ EventResult) and (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0 or EventResultDetails in~ (eventresultdetails_in))
| extend temp_isMatchTargetUsername = TargetUsername has_any(username_has_any)
| extend ASimMatchingUsername = case(
    array_length(username_has_any) == 0, "-",
    temp_isMatchTargetUsername, "TargetUsername",
    "No match"
)
| project-rename
    TargetIpAddr = AdminIPAddress,
    EventOriginalResultDetails = OperationMessageText,
    TargetPortNumber = Port
| extend AdditionalFields = iff(pack, bag_pack(
    "AdminInterface", AdminInterface,
    "ConfigVersionId", ConfigVersionId,
    "AcsInstance", AcsInstance,
    "CollectorHostName", CollectorHostName
), dynamic([]))
| extend
    IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
    Dvc = SrcDvcId
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Type,
    EventVendor,
    EventProduct,
    EventCount,
    EventSchema,
    EventSchemaVersion,
    EventStartTime,
    EventEndTime,
    EventSeverity,
    EventType,
    SrcIpAddr,
    SrcDvcId,
    SrcDvcIdType,
    EventResult,
    EventResultDetails,
    TargetUsername,
    TargetUsernameType,
    ASimMatchingUsername,
    TargetIpAddr,
    EventOriginalResultDetails,
    TargetPortNumber,
    AdditionalFields,
    IpAddr,
    Dvc
};
parser(
    starttime=starttime,
    endtime=endtime,
    username_has_any=username_has_any,
    targetappname_has_any=targetappname_has_any,
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    srchostname_has_any=srchostname_has_any,
    eventtype_in=eventtype_in,
    eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in,
    eventresult=eventresult,
    disabled=disabled,
    pack=pack)
